description: A deeply artistic, single-direction dark mode portfolio optimizing for kinetic typography and high-end motion. The core conversion goal is driving recruiter clicks to the LinkedIn profile.

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight and aggressive. Use 'text-[8vw]' or fluid scaling for massive kinetic moments.

body.rules: Generous line height, high readability. Left-aligned.

accent.usage: Overlines, chapter numbers, metadata, timeline dates. Always uppercase with tracking-[0.2em] and text-xs or text-sm.

colors.rules: Dark mode dominant. Do not use generic full-screen gradients. The primary color is exclusively 'LinkedIn Blue' (#0A66C2) to establish muscle memory for the primary conversion action. Use it for the core CTA and subtle interaction states.

surfaces: Crystal Glass: Used exclusively for the sticky navigation. bg-black/40, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/5
Technical Grid: 1px border-white/10 to divide layout sections cleanly. No muddy box-shadows.
Noise/Grain: Add a subtle fixed noise overlay to eliminate digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.spacing: Extremely generous. Use py-32 for section gaps. Use empty grid columns as negative space.

layouts.hero: 100vh height. Kinetic typography taking up 80% of the screen. Subtle parallax on the background elements. Bottom right corner reserved for a magnetic 'Connect on LinkedIn' CTA.
layouts.about: Numbered chapters ('01', '02'). Wide spacing, utilizing only 6 out of 12 grid columns for text to create tension.
layouts.projects: The 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A). Asymmetrical spans. One project spans col-span-8 row-span-2, next is col-span-4 row-span-1. Hovering the project box clips the image slightly and reveals project details.
layouts.timeline: Technical Brutalist. 1px top border per item, grid layout mapping year (mono) -> Title -> Description.
layouts.marquee: Slow Editorial Ribbon. Huge outline text (text-transparent bg-clip-text border-white/20) at text-8xl. Very slow drift.

choreography.scroll: Smooth momentum scrolling via lenis. Standard browser scroll is forbidden.
choreography.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal. Parent container has overflow-hidden. Children start at y: '100%' and animate to y: '0' with a custom cubic-bezier.
choreography.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (1.05) inside an overflow-hidden wrapper. Buttons utilize a magnetic pull effect or a background sweep.

components.navigation: Sticky, highly blurred crystal glass header. Minimal links. The absolute focal point must be a distinct, pill-shaped 'Connect' button in LinkedIn Blue.
components.magnetic_button: Custom Framer Motion component. When hovered, the button slightly pulls towards the mouse cursor.
components.project_card: Raw HTML/Tailwind. No standard 'Card' component. It should be a div with an aspect ratio, containing a next/image. On hover, a dark scrim appears and kinetic typography slides up.
components.contact_form: Shadcn based but heavily customized. Flat, transparent inputs with bottom borders only (border-b border-white/20). Focus states increase border opacity.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses a subtle bg-black/40 gradient overlay.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all framer-motion sequences.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (LinkedIn CTAs, form inputs, nav links) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-linkedin-cta').

portrait.description: Creative dark portrait with dramatic lighting for the About section.

project_1.description: Abstract tech UI on a tablet for the main project showcase.

project_2.description: Dark themed minimalist apps on screen.

project_3.description: Abstract fluid 3D sculpture representing an art-directed project.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx for all React components. Do not use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Rely completely on Tailwind utility classes. Avoid custom CSS unless absolutely necessary for complex scrollbar hiding or noise overlays.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_creation: Build structural layout sections manually using grid and flex. Only use Shadcn for the Contact Form inputs/buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.linkedin_cta: This is the primary conversion. It must appear in the Nav, in the Hero, and massively in the Footer.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
